_comment: Models behind the AI fix bot. 'primary' is the deep-thinking model; 'fallback' runs only if the primary errors / is rate-limited. Each {provider, model}: 'provider' must be one of the PROVIDERS in .github/scripts/ai_fix.py (github-models, gemini, openrouter, groq, mistral) and base_url + key env are resolved from there. Edited by ai-model-review.yml (monthly) via PR — it re-evaluates BOTH roles and only changes one when warranted.
